criterion_excerpt: Category 2: Bundle Size. Measure the PRODUCTION FRONTEND bundle for the web app in this monorepo. Spec improvement target: 15% reduction in total production bundle size, OR code splitting that reduces the initial-load (entry) bundle by 20%. Build the production frontend and measu

result.method: Replayed cohort yardstick `cat-2-bundle`: clean `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, then production build `pnpm run build:web` (tsc + vite build). Measured web/dist output with find/stat/du. Identified the initial-load (entry) chunk authoritatively from dist/index.html, which references exactly one module script (/assets/index-BOb-Bb3Z.js) and one stylesheet (/assets/index-6kpiO8Mu.css), with no modulepreload links — so initial load = entry JS (+ entry CSS).
result.method_rationale: The repo is a pnpm monorepo with a Vite/React web app (web/). The yardstick is a deterministic instrument and the repo provides its own build script, so I used the toolchain's own production build rather than the team's reported numbers. Entry chunk identity comes directly from generated index.html, which is unambiguous here (single script + single CSS, no preloads).
result.what_would_raise_confidence: A pre-change baseline build (or the prior commit) in the clone to independently reproduce the before-values and the claimed 86% initial-load reduction. The clone is a single commit, so only the 'after' state is measurable.
result.commands_summary: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; pnpm run build:web; grep -oE '/assets/[^\"]+\.(js|css)' web/dist/index.html; stat -c%s on entry js/css; find web/dist -type f / -name '*.js' / -name '*.css' -printf '%s' | awk sum; find web/dist/assets -name '*.js' | wc -l
result.self_report_comparison: Team reported initial JS 2050.51 KB -> 285.77 KB (86.06% reduction). My measured 'after' entry JS = 292823 B = 285.96 KiB, matching their 285.77 KB to ~0.07% (rounding/hash differences). The 'before' value (2050.51 KB) cannot be reproduced from this single-commit clone, but the after-state strongly corroborates the claim: the app is heavily code-split (306 JS chunks) and the entry chunk is only ~12% of total JS (2.33 MiB), consistent with a large initial-load reduction via code splitting. No material divergence on the verifiable 'after' numbers.
result.qualitative_judgment: Pass/fail gate (15% total reduction OR 20% initial-load reduction): the initial-load route is clearly satisfied by code splitting — entry chunk 285.96 KiB vs 2.33 MiB total JS. This is judgment given the baseline is not independently reproducible; the measured after-state is fully verified.
result.held_loosely: A standardized definition across repos of (a) entry = JS-only vs JS+CSS and (b) 'total bundle' = all dist assets (9.98 MiB incl. docs/images here) vs JS+CSS only (2.4 MiB) vs dist/assets only (3.4 MiB). I report all variants. Note this repo's dist also bundles ~8.8 MiB of docs/category-improvements/icons that are not part of the JS/CSS bundle, inflating the all-files total.

{
  "name": "ship",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Ship monorepo - API + Web + Shared types",
  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.27.0",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0",
    "pnpm": ">=9.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "./scripts/dev.sh",
    "docker:up": "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build",
    "docker:down": "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down",
    "docker:clean": "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down -v",
    "dev:raw": "pnpm --parallel --recursive run dev",
    "dev:api": "pnpm --filter @ship/api dev",
    "dev:web": "pnpm --filter @ship/web dev",
    "dev:shared": "pnpm --filter @ship/shared dev",
    "build": "pnpm --recursive run build",
    "build:shared": "pnpm --filter @ship/shared build",
    "build:api": "pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @ship/api build",
    "build:web": "pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @ship/web build",
    "type-check": "pnpm --recursive run type-check",
    "lint": "pnpm --recursive run lint",
    "clean": "pnpm --recursive run clean && rm -rf node_modules",
    "test": "pnpm --filter @ship/api test",
    "test:regression": "node scripts/test-regression-all.mjs",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "test:e2e:runner": "node scripts/e2e-test-runner.mjs",
    "test:e2e:regression": "node scripts/e2e-regression-runner.mjs",
    "test:e2e:ui": "playwright test --ui",
    "worktree:init": "./scripts/worktree-init.sh",
    "db:seed": "pnpm --filter @ship/api db:seed",
    "fleetgraph:seed": "pnpm --filter @ship/api fleetgraph:seed",
    "fleetgraph:eval:golden": "pnpm --filter @ship/api fleetgraph:eval:golden",
    "db:migrate": "pnpm --filter @ship/api db:migrate",
    "db:orphan-check": "pnpm --filter @ship/api db:orphan-check",
    "db:audit-volume:verify": "node scripts/category-improvements/ensure-audit-volume-db.mjs --fail-on-mismatch",
    "db:audit-volume:restore": "node scripts/category-improvements/ensure-audit-volume-db.mjs --restore --fail-on-mismatch",
    "push:deploy": "node scripts/push-deploy-railway-up.mjs",
    "deploy:railway-image": "node scripts/deploy-railway-image.mjs",
    "prepare": "husky",
    "security:compliance": "./scripts/security-compliance.sh",
    "security:probe": "node scripts/category-improvements/security-probe.mjs",
    "security:probe:live": "node scripts/category-improvements/security-probe-live.mjs",
    "postinstall": "git config merge.ours.driver true && (command -v comply >/dev/null 2>&1 && comply opensource --help >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '\\n⚠️  Treasury-compatible comply CLI not installed - pre-commit hook will require fallback tools: gitleaks, trivy, pnpm\\n   Preferred command: comply opensource --help\\n')"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.11.0",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.57.0",
    "@testcontainers/postgresql": "^11.11.0",
    "@types/supertest": "^6.0.3",
    "@vitest/ui": "^4.0.16",
    "get-port": "^7.1.0",
    "husky": "^9.1.7",
    "prettier": "^3.4.2",
    "supertest": "^7.1.4",
    "testcontainers": "^11.11.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",

print('total JS+CSS:', total_js+total_css,'B =', round(mib(total_js+total_css),2),'MiB')
print('entry JS as fraction of total JS:', round(100*entry_js/total_js,1),'%')
